heading: Run Natural Language Queries
body:
Select the extension named **MongoDB Vertex API Interpreter**
and enter the following natural language query:

```
Find the release year of the movie 'A Corner in Wheat' from VertexAI-POC cluster, sample_mflix, movies
```

![Screenshot of the Vertex AI response to the natural language query](/ai-integrations/images/avs/vertex-ai-extension-find-one.png)

Select the extension named **MongoDB Vertex API Interpreter**
and enter the following natural language query:

```
give me movies released in year 1924 from VertexAI-POC cluster, sample_mflix, movies
```

![Screenshot of the Vertex AI response to the natural language query](/ai-integrations/images/avs/vertex-ai-extension-find-all.png)

codeBlocks.content: Find the release year of the movie 'A Corner in Wheat' from VertexAI-POC cluster, sample_mflix, movies
give me movies released in year 1924 from VertexAI-POC cluster, sample_mflix, movies
